narrative.description: Llamasoft's Jaguar reinvention of Atari's vector classic wraps tube-lane shooting in psychedelic audiovisuals, adding power-ups, jump-clearance, and aggressive enemy behaviors on curved web stages.
narrative.core_loop: Rotate along the tube rim, fire into climbing enemies, collect power-ups, and use jump to escape lane threats until the stage is clear.

mechanics.map_notes: Player spins around the tube mouth targeting enemies climbing the web lanes.
mechanics.expression: Player spins around the tube mouth targeting enemies climbing the web lanes.

mechanics.map_notes: Jump launches the ship off the rim briefly to avoid lane-filling enemies and fuseballs.
mechanics.expression: Jump launches the ship off the rim briefly to avoid lane-filling enemies and fuseballs.

mechanics.map_notes: Levels advance through increasingly hostile web geometries.
mechanics.expression: Levels advance through increasingly hostile web geometries.

mechanics.map_notes: Zapper fires continuously along the active lane.
mechanics.expression: Zapper fires continuously along the active lane.

mechanics.map_notes: AI drones, lasers, and superzapper upgrades alter combat capability.
mechanics.expression: AI drones, lasers, and superzapper upgrades alter combat capability.

mechanics.map_notes: Shield depletes on enemy contact; extra shields from power-ups.
mechanics.expression: Shield depletes on enemy contact; extra shields from power-ups.

mechanics.map_notes: Spikers and flipper enemies fill lanes with unpredictable threats.
mechanics.expression: Spikers and flipper enemies fill lanes with unpredictable threats.

mechanics.map_notes: Fuseballs pulse before homing along lane edges.
mechanics.expression: Fuseballs pulse before homing along lane edges.

mechanics.map_notes: End-of-level cosmic bosses follow learnable assault cycles.
mechanics.expression: End-of-level cosmic bosses follow learnable assault cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses shift geometry and enemy spawn rates between phases.
mechanics.expression: Bosses shift geometry and enemy spawn rates between phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Continues restart the current level with score penalty.
mechanics.expression: Continues restart the current level with score penalty.

mechanics.map_notes: Tube geometry changes lane count and enemy approach angles.
mechanics.expression: Tube geometry changes lane count and enemy approach angles.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Tempest 2000 through its core shooter loop.
